channel.title: Basement Notifications
channel.description: Site updates and important notifications for Basement users

item.title: Basement v5.3.7 released!
item.description:
Minor update this time but some nice quality of life improvements!
Changes: - Added a new 'Trakt Sync' setting. You can now sync your bookmarks and watch history to Trakt! - Added colored indicator for intro, recap, credits, and preview segments in the player! - Updated the pause overlay to show the episode rating instead of the show's rating. - Fixed subtitle enable/disable not persisting between episodes or media. - Scroll to top when changing settings categories. - Other small bugs and issues fixed!
Thank everyone!

item.title: Basement v5.3.6 released!
item.description:
WOW, crazy day! Our Discord server got taken down so we had to move to a new one, but I got an update for you!
I'm sad to see 25,000 members and thousands of messages gone. I'll take a while to get all of those back up. Especially all the feature requests that we kept track of in discord. 😭
Anyway, we're back up and this time we've got a backup system figured out in case it ever happens again.
To make it up to you all, I've released a new version of Basement with some bug fixes and improvements.
Additions: - Added new 'Pause Overlay' setting to show the title and description of the current media when the player is paused and idle for 10 seconds. - New custom theme! You can now mix and match other themes to create your own custom theme! - Added a new caption match percentage. It uses TheIntroDB to ensure the subtitle doesn't overlap with the credits. - Added "For You" section to the discover page! Pulling from watch history and bookmarks. - Added new "Top 10" Movies section to the discover page! - Added a new 'Auto Skip Segments' setting. - Added support for preview segments from TheIntroDB! - Added a link to the desktop app on the onboarding page. - Added a toggle to disable 0-9 progress keyboard shortcuts. - Made custom source order collapsable.
Fixes: - Fixed bookmarking a whole collection removing already bookmarked media from previous bookmark groups. - Hid the chromecast/airplay button when the stream requires extra headers that aren't supported when casting. - Fixed favoriting episodes not populating the favorites 'season' immediately. - Removed 'open in external player' button from the player — it never really worked. - Remove duplicate media from more content pages. - Made the details modal load much faster letting each section load individually. - Synced some settings that weren't already synced to the backend. - Improved season metadata fetching to be faster. - Attempted to fix the subtitles not showing for some users. - Many other bugs and issues!
Thanks to everyone who helped build the server back up and get everything running as it was before. Can't express how much I appreciate all of you. Truly amazing community and friends. 🫶
If you know anyone who was in the old server and isn't now, please invite them, that would be appreciated! Also, if you have any archives or content that is missing, please help us add it back!
Enjoy all the new features and fixes!

item.title: Basement desktop app is now available!
item.description:
The Basement desktop app is now available for download! You can now stream movies and TV shows separately from your browser!
The app has the extension built in, so all the best sources are already configured and ready to use! You can still set up FED API from the settings page as well!
The app is available for Windows, macOS, and Linux. You can download it from the link below!

item.title: New TheIntroDB Skip Segments feature!
item.description:
You can now quickly leave feedback, correct, and submit skip times for movies and TV shows using your TheIntroDB API key right within Basement!
If you haven't made an account on TheIntroDB yet, you can do so below! Generate your API key and add it to your Basement connections settings!
Then, the next time you encounter a skip button, you can leave feedback and correct the skip time if it's incorrect!
And if an episode does't have a segment yet, you can submit it yourself from the new Skip Segments menu on the player!

item.title: Basement v5.3.4 released!
item.description:
I know it's been a while, but there's finally new features and fixes that many people have been waiting for!
- Added a new Watch History page! Separate from the currently watching section. Accessible from the dropdown menu. - Added subtitle translation! Thanks to @vlOd2 you can now translate any subtitle to any other language! - Added passkey support for new account creation. - Added a button to quickly find the next available source! - Added support for multiple skip segment types including recaps and credits! - Added a new total watched percentage and watched count to the details modal! - Added support for multiple backend servers. - Added more keyboard shortcuts! - Fixed uploading and downloading captions on some devices. - Fixed auto quality not working. - Fixed some Airplay issues - Fixed many other bugs and issues!
Thanks to everyone who has supported and we'll be working hard to bring you new great things!
Also, my new project, TheIntroDB, is now available to everyone, please submit intros, recaps, and credits for all your favorite movies and shows! Signup below!

item.title: New Skip Intro Time API!
item.description:
Introducing TheIntroDB, a new skip intro time API! TheIntroDB is a free, community-driven platform that provides skip intro times for thousands of movies and TV shows.
TheIntroDB is powered by the community. You can contribute by adding skip intro times for movies and TV shows to the database!
It's now available to Basement users and soon to available as a separate free API!
Join the waitlist below to get access to the API when it's ready!

item.title: Backend issues have been fixed!
item.description:
You are now able to log into your account again! Hopefully less downtime going forward!
All of your account data has been migrated to the new server, so you can log in with existing passphrase.
We've also introduced some new backend servers, so you can now choose which one you want to use. Sorry for all the downtime!

item.title: Basement v5.3.3 released!
item.description:
Merry Christmas everyone! 🎄
I hope everyone has a great holiday season this year, and thank you to everyone who has supported Basement! I'm very happy to have this community and give you all free movies and tv. This is a pretty big update thats been in the works, but I wanted to get it out before Christmas! Hopefully, we'll have another smaller update before the end of the year!
Additions: - Revamped the captions menu to sort by language - Added a new Auto Select caption button to automatically choose and enable a caption! - Added a new setting to customize the keyboard shortcuts! - Added a new Minimal Cards setting to hide the bottom text on all media cards - Improved visual feedback when a video is not found - Reworked the extensions onboarding page to reference the new userscript alternative - Added a new button to mark a movie as watched from the details modal - Added new Cobalt theme - Added new Febbox usage indicator under the token input - Added a new dropdown to change the sorting of your bookmarks or watching section (A-Z, Z-A, release date, etc)!
Fixes: - Improved caption selection logic to be more consistent - Improved auto quality selection logic to be more consistent - Improved buffering logic to load the video quicker and be more stable - Fixed "Similar" section showing the wrong content - Fixed carousel title padding and alignment - Fixed search bar placement within the PWA on iOS - Fixed many other small bugs and issues!
Enjoy and have a lovely holiday!

item.title: New Userscript alternative to the extension!
item.description:
If you prefer to use a userscript instead of the extension, you now have the option!
It should work almost exactly the same as the extension, but without the need to install an extension. Unfortunately, our Firefox extension store page keeps getting taken down, so this is the alternative until we can get it back up or if you install the .xpi manually.
Some things to note:
- The extension is still the most reliable method! - This does not currently work in Safari or Orion due to Webkit’s limitations with webRequest APIs. :(
Thanks to Duplicake for the incredible help building this!
Use the link below to install the userscript into Violentmonkey or Tampermonkey!
P.S. We're still working on getting some new sources online, so expect more updates soon!
